pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly clear and evaluate these stations. Real GEOFON station codes verified via http://geofon.gfz-potsdam.de/fdsnws/station/1/query?network=GE.
Verified via export_result.sh which evaluates the presence of '^scautopick' and '^scamp' in the key files.
Verified via task_utils.sh setting SEISCOMP_ROOT=/home/ga/seiscomp and setup_task.sh setting BINDINGS_DIR=$SEISCOMP_ROOT/etc/key.
Verified via setup_task.sh which calls 'launch_seiscomp_gui scconfig'.
Conceptual match verified by task scripts configuring module bindings for stations.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring SeisComP module bindings for three real GEOFON network stations (GE.GSI, GE.BKB, GE.SANI) to use 'scautopick' and 'scamp'. The target configuration directory is verified as /home/ga/seiscomp/etc/key, and the target GUI application to configure this is 'scconfig'. The configuration files start in an artificially cleared state.
